description_long: This tall, slender obelisk features a central vertical shaft flanked by four cylindrical columns, each attached to a square base platform. The main shaft tapers smoothly towards a pointed tip, reminiscent of a rocket or stylized monument, and is segmented with subtle horizontal bands and ridges. The four side columns are evenly spaced and rise nearly parallel to the central shaft, terminating just below the tip. The base is a simple, solid square plinth that provides stability and visual grounding for the structure. The entire object has a uniform, unadorned surface with no visible inscriptions or decorative motifs. Its overall appearance is modern and monumental, suitable for placement in a public square or park.
description: A tall, modern obelisk with a central shaft and four cylindrical side columns on a square base, featuring a pointed tip and smooth, unornamented surfaces.
description_view_0: Front view shows the central shaft flanked by four evenly spaced cylindrical columns, all rising from a square base.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the narrow profile of the obelisk, with the columns appearing as thin lines beside the central shaft.
description_view_2: Rear view mirrors the front, displaying the same arrangement of the central shaft and four columns.
description_view_3: Opposite side view is identical to the first side, emphasizing the slenderness and symmetry of the structure.
attribute_base_design: The base is a simple, solid square plinth with clean edges and no visible steps, platforms, or decorative features. It appears robust and functional, likely made of concrete.
attribute_tip_design: The tip is sharply pointed, conical, and smooth, with no unique features or decorations, matching the rest of the structure's minimalist style.
